styleTemplate: Vintage woodcut engraving print, sporting newspaper illustration. [SCENE]. The hero player is rendered in dark detailed ink; any background figures are noticeably lighter and sketchier. Aged cream paper (#F5F1E6), dark sepia-black ink (#2C281F), fine parallel hatching and cross-hatching. Modern athletic players, contemporary plain kits, no logos, no numbers. The football is the ONLY red element (#B23B2E). Faint hatched ground shadow, no other scenery. No text, no borders, no arrows, no diagrams. Generous margins. Same engraving style, line weight and paper tone as the reference image. 3:4 portrait.

archetypes.scene: Hero deep in his own half striking a long raking pass; the ball sails high over two faint distant opponents
archetypes.subject: breaks lines from the base of midfield

archetypes.scene: Hero standing with one foot on the ball, head up, pointing to direct play (anchor image)
archetypes.subject: sets the rhythm and is always an option

archetypes.scene: Hero turning out of a pressing trap with the ball, two faint opponents lunging at him from both sides
archetypes.subject: receives under pressure and comes out the far side

archetypes.scene: Hero clipping a through-pass; the ball rolls through the gap between two faint defenders into open space
archetypes.subject: unlocks defences with the final ball

archetypes.scene: Hero at the touchline whipping a deep cross; a faint teammate attacks the far post in the background
archetypes.subject: creates from the flanks

archetypes.scene: Hero behind a placed free-kick ball; a faint three-man defensive wall jumps in the background
archetypes.subject: is a weapon from set-pieces

archetypes.scene: Hero with his back to goal cushioning a lay-off; a faint teammate arrives onto the pass at speed
archetypes.subject: plays as the team's connector up front

archetypes.scene: Hero nutmegging a faint wrong-footed defender, flamboyant body shape
archetypes.subject: makes something from nothing

archetypes.scene: Hero bursting between two faint beaten opponents with the ball glued to his feet
archetypes.subject: carries the ball past opponents

archetypes.scene: Hero squaring up a faint crouched full-back one-on-one, ball rolled under his studs
archetypes.subject: beats his man one-on-one out wide

archetypes.scene: Hero in a flat-out sprint chasing the ball knocked ahead; a faint trailing opponent is left far behind
archetypes.subject: threatens with raw pace

archetypes.scene: Hero breaking away with the ball; faint scattered opponents behind him still turning around
archetypes.subject: is devastating in the seconds after a turnover

archetypes.scene: Hero darting past the shoulder of a faint last defender as the ball arcs over the top toward him
archetypes.subject: times his runs off the last shoulder

archetypes.scene: Hero sprinting around the outside of a faint teammate on the ball, calling for the release
archetypes.subject: is an athletic wide runner from deep

archetypes.scene: Hero stabbing the ball home at the near post; faint wrong-footed goalkeeper and goal frame behind
archetypes.subject: lives on the last touch in the box

archetypes.scene: Hero striking a mid-air scissor volley; faint goal frame in the background
archetypes.subject: scores every type of goal

archetypes.scene: Hero arriving at the edge of the box to smash a loose bouncing ball first time; faint cluster of players behind
archetypes.subject: arrives late for chaos in the box

archetypes.scene: Hero in full follow-through from long range; faint goal with a stretching keeper far in the distance
archetypes.subject: is a threat from distance

archetypes.scene: Hero bending a curling shot with his instep, a faint beaten defender left behind on the outside
archetypes.subject: scores by cutting in from wide

archetypes.scene: Hero out-jumping a faint opponent to power a header, both airborne, hero clearly higher
archetypes.subject: dominates both boxes in the air

archetypes.scene: Hero chesting the ball down with a broad planted stance while a faint defender leans on his back
archetypes.subject: holds the ball up and brings others into play

archetypes.scene: Hero winning a shoulder-to-shoulder duel against a faint opponent, ball between their feet
archetypes.subject: wins his individual battles on the ground and in the air

archetypes.scene: Hero calmly stepping across a faint attacker to intercept a rolling pass
archetypes.subject: intercepts and positions rather than diving in

archetypes.scene: Hero sprinting back goal-side of a faint attacker in possession, closing the gap
archetypes.subject: defends the space behind with pace

archetypes.scene: Hero in a full sliding tackle cleanly taking the ball off a faint opponent
archetypes.subject: breaks up play by force

archetypes.scene: Hero pressed tight against the back of a faint attacker trying to receive, denying the turn
archetypes.subject: locks onto and smothers a danger man

archetypes.scene: Hero standing tall and poking the ball away from a faint dribbler with a calm standing tackle
archetypes.subject: is a positional shield that never leaves its post

archetypes.scene: Hero mid-lunge closing down a faint panicked opponent on the ball
archetypes.subject: hunts the ball down for the full ninety

archetypes.scene: Hero striding on strongly while faint opponents stand bent over exhausted behind him
archetypes.subject: is a physical outlier who never stops

archetypes.scene: Hero leaping high chest-first for a dropping ball, explosive full-body athletic extension
archetypes.subject: is a physical outlier in every direction

archetypes.scene: Hero with a captain's armband barking orders and pointing; faint teammates align into a defensive line behind
archetypes.subject: leads and organises those around him

archetypes.scene: Hero roaring with clenched fists over a won ball; a faint beaten opponent sits on the ground behind
archetypes.subject: sets the tone with bravery and aggression

archetypes.scene: Hero goalkeeper at full horizontal stretch fingertipping the ball away; goal frame behind him
archetypes.subject: keeps out what he should and plenty he shouldn't

archetypes.scene: Hero goalkeeper at the edge of his area side-volleying a precise pass out, composed like an outfielder
archetypes.subject: plays as an eleventh outfielder

archetypes.scene: Hero goalkeeper rising above two faint attackers to claim a high cross with both hands; goal frame behind
archetypes.subject: owns his penalty area

archetypes.scene: Hero goalkeeper far outside his area sliding to clear the ball ahead of a faint onrushing attacker
archetypes.subject: defends the space behind the line
